results.notes: Vandelay client detail exposed contacts, primary contact, contracts, details, portal/wiki links, and billing links. Observed sidebar overlap/a11y/mobile issues are already tracked by open QA beads.
Invoice list rendered clients, contract names, dates, totals, and text status badges. Known mobile/status table findings are already tracked.
Invoice INV-2026103 rendered client, contract, posted status, line items, subtotal, tax, total, cost, margin, and QuickBooks state. The missing standalone mark-paid path is already tracked.
Asset VAN-APP01 rendered client, asset type/status, RMM recency, contract, alert state, and recent linked tickets. Existing mobile alert-tab/link issues were reproduced but not duplicated.
VAN-APP01 Alerts & Tickets tab exposed ticket links back to T-1, T-9, and T-174 from the asset side. The alert-title dead link and mobile responsiveness defects are already open.

dedup_observed: client-overview|[responsive] Sidebar covers page content after resizing from mobile to desktop
invoice-detail|No mark-paid affordance for standalone invoices
asset-detail|Asset detail shows conflicting OS values without a source/conflict warning
asset-ticket-link|Asset alert titles look clickable but do not open anything
asset-ticket-link|[responsive] Asset Alerts & Tickets tab makes linked tickets unreadable on mobile
design-audit|[a11y] No H1 on primary console screens + unlabeled icon-buttons/selects
design-audit|[color] Pervasive muted-text contrast below WCAG AA across console
